title: stelis euprepes
intro: Stelis euprepes, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid found in Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis euprepes include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Stelis euprepes are typically made by drying the plant's flowers and leaves, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea, which is consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
